case_title: EGOROFF, DIMITRI vs. MC DUFFY, FRANK IND/DBA THE BLARNEY STONE BAR/REST et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EGOROFF, DIMITRI AS TO DEFENDANT MC DUFFY, FRANK IND/DBA THE BLARNEY STONE BAR/REST BURNS, KIEVEN T.IND/DBA THE BLARNEY STONE BAR/REST THE BLARNEY STONE & BAR & RESTAURANT, INC/BUSINESS DOES 1 TO 10 STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-09-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-09-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-20-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-09-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON APR-09-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR MAY-09-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-09-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAY-09-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE: AS TO WHY THERE HAS BEEN A FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. IF NO APPEARANCE AND/OR GOOD CAUSE COURT WILL DISMISS CASE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-31-1996 CONTINUED FROM MAY-09-1996 TO JUN-10-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
